info.description: REST mirror of the reearth-accounts GraphQL surface.
info.title: reearth-accounts REST API

post.summary: Check a permission for the current user

get.description: Default form returns an array of users. When page, page_size, or alias is supplied, a paginated object is returned instead: {"items": [user...], "pagination": {"page", "page_size", "total"}}.
get.summary: List users by IDs (optionally paginated with alias filter)

200.description: array form; the paginated form returns an object wrapper (see description)

get.summary: Find users by name or alias
Find a user by name or email

post.summary: Find or create a user (M2M or JWT)

204.description: No Content (stub mirroring the GraphQL findOrCreate resolver)

delete.summary: Remove an auth provider from the current user

post.summary: Verify a user with a code

get.description: Response shape depends on the selector: ids and user_id return an array of workspaces; name and alias return a single workspace object; user_id with page/page_size returns a paginated object {"items": [...], "pagination": {...}}.
get.summary: List workspaces by a single selector (ids|name|alias|user_id)

200.description: array for ids/user_id; a single object for name/alias; a paginated object when paginating by user_id (see description)

post.summary: Add user members to a workspace
